Edge inference should extend, not replace, centralized
AI. Central systems remain essential for training,

Inference must remain practical to operate, update,
observe, and govern as deployments grow over time.

How distance shapes AI performance at scale

— Runs far from data sources

— Requires data to move across networks

— Delays time-sensitive decisions
Centralized inference

— Runs closer to data sources

— Reduces the need to move data

— Enables faster, more consistent decisions
